title: Rapportage Bundle (Dashboards)
description: Operator-importable bundle of the `reports` register + `dashboard` schema. Dashboards are first-class objects: each carries a layout grid + a widgets array describing which charts / KPIs / tables to render and where to fetch their data. The frontend ReportView renders these via CnDashboardPage and the existing nextcloud-vue Cn*Widget components, feeding them from the AggregationRunner output. Operators get the standard schema/object UI for free; can RBAC dashboards per-group; can extend with custom properties.

registers.title: Reports
registers.description: Operator-defined dashboards and scheduled reports. Each dashboard object describes which widgets to render and where to fetch their data; a Phase 2 ReportRenderJob can render scheduled dashboards to PDF/Excel/ODS and dispatch via email or Files.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Operator-defined dashboard / report. Layout is a CnDashboardPage grid; widgets is an array of widget descriptors that the frontend maps to nextcloud-vue Cn*Widget components. Each widget references a target (register, schema, aggregation) on the source data.

titel.title: Titel
titel.description: Display title shown in the dashboard list + as the page header when rendered.

beschrijving.title: Beschrijving
beschrijving.description: Free-form description; surfaced as a subheader on the rendered dashboard.

category.title: Category
category.description: Coarse grouping for the dashboard list — operators can filter by it.

layout.title: Layout
layout.description: CnDashboardPage layout descriptor. `cols` controls grid width; `rows` is computed from widget count when omitted.

widgets.title: Widgets
widgets.description: Ordered list of widget descriptors. The frontend maps `type` to the matching CnWidget component; `dataSource` declares where to fetch the widget's data; `options` carries per-widget configuration. Validated by WidgetAnnotationValidator at save time.

type.title: Widget type
type.description: Maps to the corresponding Cn*Widget. `kpi` -> CnKpiGrid (single number), `chart` -> CnChartWidget, `table` -> CnTableWidget, `sparkline` -> CnSparklineWidget, `tile` -> CnTileWidget, `stats` -> CnStatsBlock.

dataSource.title: Data source
dataSource.description: References an x-openregister-aggregations declaration on a target schema, or a GraphQL query for cross-register widgets.

mode.title: Source mode
mode.description: `aggregation` -> calls /api/objects/aggregations/{register}/{schema}/{name}; `graphql` -> POSTs to /api/graphql with the supplied query; `statistics` -> calls MagicStatisticsHandler-backed register/schema chart endpoint.

aggregation.title: Aggregation name
aggregation.description: Name of the aggregation declared under x-openregister-aggregations on the target schema. Required when mode is `aggregation`.

graphqlQuery.title: GraphQL query
graphqlQuery.description: Required when mode is `graphql`. Use template variables {{startDate}} / {{endDate}} for date-range widgets.

options.title: Widget options
options.description: Per-widget config — chart kind, axis labels, value format, etc. Free-form to keep the schema flexible; the renderer ignores unknown keys.

valueField.title: Value field
valueField.description: Which aggregation result field to pluck (`count`, `sum`, `avg`, etc.). Defaults to `count`.

trendField.title: Trend field
trendField.description: For type=sparkline — array field carrying the trend values.

columns.title: Table columns
columns.description: For type=table only. Each entry is `{key, label, format?}`.

icon.title: Material design icon name
icon.description: For type=tile/kpi — sets the leading icon.

color.title: Accent color
color.description: Optional accent color for the widget (hex or NC token).

layout.title: Widget grid placement
layout.description: CnDashboardPage cell placement. When omitted, widgets flow left-to-right in declaration order.

schedule.title: Schedule (Phase 2)
schedule.description: Optional schedule descriptor — when present, ReportRenderJob will render this dashboard at the given cadence and dispatch the result via `delivery`. Phase 1 ignores this field.

intervalSec.title: Interval (seconds)
intervalSec.description: Re-render cadence in seconds. 86400 = daily, 604800 = weekly. Mirrors the notifications-v2 deferral (no cron parsing).

delivery.title: Delivery (Phase 2)
delivery.description: Where the rendered report goes when the schedule fires. Phase 1 ignores this field.

filesFolder.title: Target Files folder
filesFolder.description: Absolute path inside the operator's Files (or a configurable system folder). Defaults to `/Reports/<dashboard-slug>/`.
